creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Please show the full log. The error isn't from clutter, which it was from  
one of ports that depend on clutter. It's why the -f works, because  
clutter isn't problem. One of ports has wrong number of library or path of  
dependency in its Makefile, so it can't find clutter and trying to install  
clutter while it exists.

Cheers,
Mezz
